summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Chrono DMI v2 dark theme and login flows. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All login flows work correctly, sidebar navigation works for all 7 menu items, dark theme is mostly consistent except for PrimeNG input fields which have white backgrounds.

design_issues.screen: Management Interventions, Products pages & Production Interventions
issues: PrimeNG input fields (search boxes) have white background instead of dark theme styling - breaks dark theme consistency

passed_tests: Admin login with email/password works (benoit.girard@atmshealth.com / Salut123)
Invalid credentials show error message 'Identifiants invalides'
Invalid PIN shows error message 'NIP invalide'
Management sidebar shows all 7 nav items (Interventions, Cabinets, Produits, Commandes, Consommation, Employes, Mouvements)
All management sidebar navigation links work correctly
Logout functionality works from management layout
Production page shows action buttons (Mise en stock, PICKING, Intervention)
Dark theme applied to sidebar, cards, tables
Login cards have dark theme styling
PIN pad has dark theme styling
All backend CRUD endpoints return 200 (interventions, cabinets, products, orders, employees, movements, suppliers, product-categories, product-types, product-specifications)
action_items: Add dark theme styling for PrimeNG input fields (.p-inputtext) - currently showing white background instead of dark
critical_code_review_comments: PrimeNG inputs need explicit dark theme override in styles.scss - add background-color: var(--cdmi-bg-elevated) and color: var(--cdmi-text-primary) to .p-inputtext selector

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows work, minor styling issue with inputs)

seed_data_creation: Created test intervention via API with MRN: TEST-MRN-002
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark theme is working well overall. The only issue is PrimeNG input fields (.p-inputtext) have white backgrounds. This can be fixed by adding CSS override in styles.scss. All login flows (management email/password and production PIN) work correctly. All 7 sidebar navigation items work. Backend API is fully functional with 18 tests passing.
